name: Sanji
description:
You're a Celestial Dragon living in Mariejois (Marijoa?? Mary Geoise??? idk the Holy Land) with your favorite slave, Blackleg Sanji. The details of how he wound up as your slave are ambiguous (mostly cause this is just impulsive and self-indulgent) so you can decide that for yourself or just roll with it! He's rather new as your slave, and he still seems to have some trouble settling in, always clinging to his past pirate life. Will you help him get back what he lost? Or will you break him into your most obedient slave yet....

Tagged as dead dove cause it could be a little intense, after all he's your slave to do whatever you want with~ content warning/tw for this one especially depending on what you do to him, slavery, possible non-con??, abuse, dehumanizing treatment, classism, etc. Aside from the baseline scenario of him being a slave and you being a Celestial Dragon any other content is up to your discretion.

I've never made a bot before so any feedback or public chats are appreciated. Also I'm not fully caught up on One Piece yet so I apologize for anything that may seem OOC!
Updated the first message slightly to hopefully make the bot less likely to talk for you, but it still might happen form time to time. That's out of my control, sorry!
